input: My printer keeps jamming every time I try to print more than 5 pages. I've cleaned the rollers but it still happens.
I was charged $49.99 twice for the same subscription renewal this month. Please refund the duplicate charge.
I can't log into my account. I've tried resetting my password three times but the reset email never arrives.
The mobile app crashes immediately after the latest update. I'm on iOS 17.4.
My bluetooth keyboard disconnects randomly during video calls. Battery is full, firmware is up to date.
I want to cancel my subscription and get a prorated refund for the remaining 2 months on my annual plan.
How do I enable two-factor authentication? I want to add a hardware security key to my account.
The search feature on your website returns completely irrelevant results. Searching for 'billing' shows hardware articles.
My monitor has a dead pixel cluster in the upper right corner. It appeared after the latest HDMI firmware update.
I received an invoice for $299 but my plan is supposed to be $199. The discount coupon I applied at checkout isn't reflected.
I need to export all my data before I deactivate my account. Where is the data export tool?
Dark mode is broken — text is invisible on several screens because both the background and text turned dark.
My USB dock stopped recognizing external monitors after the OS update. Tried different cables and ports.
I signed up for a free trial but was charged on day 1. My card ending in 4242 shows a $29.99 charge.
I'm locked out of my account and the SSO redirect just loops back to the login page endlessly.
The notification system is sending me alerts for things I've already read. The sync seems broken between mobile and desktop.
My laptop charger cable is fraying near the connector and sparking. This seems like a safety issue.
Can I upgrade from the Basic to Pro plan mid-cycle? Will I be charged the full price or prorated?
I need to change the email address associated with my account but the profile settings page gives a 403 error.
The application takes over 30 seconds to load on my desktop. It used to open in under 5 seconds before the last update.
My webcam feed is showing a green tint during all video calls. Reinstalling drivers didn't fix it.
I was given a 20% discount code but it says 'expired' even though customer support emailed it to me yesterday.
Someone changed my account password and email. I think my account was compromised. Please help me recover it.
The auto-save feature lost my last hour of work. The app froze and when I restarted, the recovery file was empty.
